## Verdict

| Metric | V14E_BEAR_ONLY | ORB_DIRECTION |
|---|---|---|
| WF ratio | 1.056 | **2.916** |
| OOS P&L stability | Mixed (VIX-dependent) | **Strong** (OOS WR 79.9% > IS WR 54.1%) |
| Concentration | VIX regime (not quarter) | **Q2-2026 = 85%** |
| Regime robustness | FAIL (VIX25+ = -$390) | **PASS** (works across VIX regimes per VIX stratification) |

**Winner: ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER (#5)** shows superior walk-forward stability with 2.9x IS→OOS improvement and stronger OOS performance. V14E_BEAR_ONLY is VIX-fragile; ORB is regime-robust.

## Recommendation

Promote ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER to higher ratification priority. V14E_BEAR_ONLY requires VIX-conditional deployment (only trade in VIX15-20) to match ORB's stability.
